data.body: WS2 (catty-noun-lyre) LANDED: commit af2f4df01. E4 confident-assertion lexicon + scope-exclusion sub-check; NEW hedge 1-TURN criterion (CANONICAL_LLM + criteria_routing + plan_review_hedge.md), ADR 0033 (1-TURN not DET), rubric-level E6 dedup, eval cases. Closed first-try both attestations. 4/11 done (WS1,WS6,WS7,WS2). Stack: WS1 4f20635dd->WS6 723f30f1c->WS7 f0b736ce8->WS2 af2f4df01. Next: WS3 enumeration overlays (G-5/G-10).
